posts.author: KyleT (Kyle Tucker)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Currently I am implementing a board to Map locations of providers and clients.
I have used the location column and the map displays correctly.
I just had a few question that I couldn’t seem to figure out.

When looking at the Map view of a board, I cannot reach a pins items without first clicking on filter on the map view. Is this intended? If not can I change this?

When viewing an items card in map view it shows every column. I have on the table hidden some columns. Is there a way to only show a few of these or select columns in this view?
Sorry the pictures formatted weird.

first view1900×1024 139 KB

Default Map view
